final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-historical
Asset type: long horizontal scroll painting (工笔重彩长卷), panoramic scene
Primary request: panoramic view of the Lantern Festival night in Tang Dynasty Chang'an city, ten thousand flower lanterns illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: Tang Dynasty Chang'an city streets at night, grand city gates, traditional timber-frame architecture, bustling crowds celebrating the Lantern Festival
Subject: thousands of ornate flower lanterns (花灯) in varied shapes — lotus, fish, dragon, phoenix — hanging from eaves, poles, and carried by revelers; dense festive crowd in Tang-dynasty attire filling the wide avenues
Style/medium: 工笔重彩 (gongbi meticulous brushwork with rich mineral pigments), traditional Chinese painting, horizontal hand-scroll format
Composition/framing: wide panoramic horizontal composition, bird's-eye to eye-level sweep across the full cityscape, long-scroll layout
Lighting/mood: warm golden and amber glow from ten thousand lanterns, deep indigo night sky, festive and magnificent atmosphere
Color palette: deep indigo and black night sky, warm gold and vermillion lantern light, malachite green and azurite blue architectural details, rich mineral pigment tones
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture, fine ink linework with layered mineral pigment washes, delicate brushstroke detail on costumes and lanterns
Constraints: maintain 工笔重彩 meticulous line-and-fill style throughout; no Western perspective distortion; keep Tang architectural silhouettes accurate
Avoid: modern elements, impressionistic blur, flat cartoon style, watermark
